entry.title: be with you
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 777Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: It seems my light's been swallowed up / I've used up every ounce of luck / I need to leap into the fire / Find a higher power / And reach for something new Derek wishes he could go back in time, give his life in return for his family’s. Not a day goes by that he doesn’t think of them, regret what he did. Sometimes it seems there’s nothing left for him, that his future was enveloped in flames as well that day, that nothing will ever go right for him again. Because he doesn’t deserve for it to.But then — I need somewhere that's safe to run / It can't just be with anyone / It's got to be with you / It's got to be with you Stiles.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: Neal's Therapist
entry.summary:
Author: Tankeika

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 132,223Chapters: 12/13Kudos: 18

Summary: Neal Caffrey is picked up from prison by Peter to begin their work together. It goes well, at first. Until a few weeks in when Neal makes a run for it for the first time, cutting his anklet, unknowingly giving the now divorced, Peter Burke, the perfect opportunity to finally enact his long awaited plan. For those here for the Derek/Stiles tag, they're introduced in chapter 9! Sorry it took so long, and thanks for your patience!!!! ❤️

entry.title: A Flower Made Of Iron
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,044,652Chapters: 54/?Kudos: 73

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Tangled, Ravelled, and Undogged
entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,421Chapters: 1/9Kudos: 5

Summary: After making several mistakes in a row, Stiles finds himself stuck in a haunted manor the middle of a cursed wood, and faced with a terrifying, monstrous Beast demanding custody of whatever creature first greets Stiles at his front gate in exchange for Stiles' freedom. (But the Beast never said that Stiles couldn't visit.)

entry.title: He Was My Consequence
entry.summary:
Author: esmrlda99

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,522Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Nerdy, shy Stiles—always buried in books and mocked for it—crosses the wrong line when she exposes campus bad boy Derek after a brutal fight. Suspended because of her, he comes back with one goal: make her life miserable. But when he catches her alone in the restricted library, secretly reading erotic novels—that’s when everything shifts. Teasing, humiliating, pushing her boundaries… until hate and tension blur into something neither of them can control, and the girl he hated becomes the one he can’t stop wanting.

entry.title: For the Moon Goddess
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 72,298Chapters: 40/42Kudos: 130

Summary: Stiles is a new novice at the Beacon Hills Temple of the Moon Goddess, where the priests have forsworn all women and have ritual sex to make seminal offerings to their deity. In an AU where a moon cult is the dominant religion in an alternate fantasy-type world, Stiles navigates friendship, love, and a confusing priesthood that has way too many rules about sex for basically being Sex University.A lot of other pairings along the way, but from the beginning, this story is about how we get to Sterek.

entry.title: We Ain’t Angry At You, Love. You’re The Greatest Thing We’ve Lost.
entry.summary:
Author: Christell_Nobody

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,271Chapters: 11/13Kudos: 910

Summary: Inspired By; You’re Gonna Gar Far By Noah Kahan & Brandi CarlileSince Void, so much has happened. His dad is still just as neglectful, and now all his friends just stopped all contact. Derek and Peter left. If it wasn’t for Melissa and Jordan he’d be drowning and probably dead. After his 16th birthday he makes a decision, Melissa and Jordan help him and are supportive, a bit heartbroken but understanding.Noah doesn’t even care what he’s signing. Doesn’t care he signed his parental rights away, but was he ever a parent?With promises to keep contact, he is off.“So pack up your car, put a hand on your heart.”

entry.title: A Fragile Thing
entry.summary:
Author: OyasumiPunPun

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,604Chapters: 8/10Kudos: 47

Summary: Derek Hale wanders into a forgotten corner of the city one rainy night, drawn by the pull of cyber-jazz from a hidden stairwell. Inside an underground gallery, one painting stops him cold—and then the artist does.Stiles Stilinski, with amber eyes, turpentine-stained hands, and an unsettling way of seeing right through people, offers something Derek has never allowed himself to want.One encounter. One fragile thing.And the carefully constructed life he’s trapped in—marriage, family, name—begins to crack.

entry.title: yearn for sleep that won't come
entry.summary:
Author: thatsanovelidea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 75,816Chapters: 9/10Kudos: 194

Summary: He’s been obsessed with Derek Hale ever since he moved to Beacon Hills. He used to imagine running into him at coffee shops and becoming friends and then boyfriends. No matter that Derek Hale’s reputation as "Derek Hale: sex god" had already started garnering traction by the time Stiles got to high school with him. And plus, you know, there’s the whole straight thing. But Stiles always held out some hope, because Derek wouldn’t have been the first “straight” jock on the lacrosse team to bend him over. He wouldn’t even have been the second. He would have been the third. So, there was always that little inkling of want in the back of Stiles’ mind, but it never came to fruition. Derek Hale went on to sleep with lots and lots and lots of girls and never once did he even spare a glance at Stiles or run into him at a coffee shop. And Stiles was sure, when he started at Beacon Hills University last year, that the chances were even slimmer, because this was college and there were twenty times as many students here as in high school. So, he quite confidently resigned himself to the fact that a relationship with Derek Hale would forever remain his deepest, darkest fantasy. But then six days ago, he showed up to Am Lit.

entry.title: Hero Management
entry.summary:
Author: ThoseSadisticTendencies

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,199Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 827

Summary: Stiles gets abducted by hunters one night and subsequently tortured to draw in the valuable members of the pack. However, matters quickly go south when they discover the connection between him and Derek.Angst and darkness with a semi-happy ending.AU in that Derek doesn’t get kidnapped by Kate Argent and they don’t go to Mexico but other semi-canon stuff may occur

entry.title: Mystical Moon Roomies
entry.summary:
Author: lark_baobei

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,229Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 67

Summary: "Derek? What the hell are you doing in my room at three in the morning? Seriously, Sourwolf, this is weird even for your standards."---"No, no, no, this can't be happening again, Derek. When you realize what's going on, you're going to kill me or something worse, which wouldn't be very nice considering you're the one breaking into my house every full moon," Stiles huffed as he tried to get the wolf off him.---"Okay, we're going to have to set some rules if we're going to be mystical moon roomies. Come here, pup," and he caught him in his arms as they settled into bed, just as they had a month ago.
